domains.description: Dungeon and cave chest, pot, key-drop, and boss checks derived from underworld room state.
Surface checks tied to overworld screen flags and landmarks.
NPC, tablet, and scripted interaction checks driven by dedicated flags.
Special event-style checks such as merchant, uncle, hobo, and purple chest.
Shop-slot checks reflected through the ALTTP shop buffer.

groups.label: Shop Checks
source_examples: Shop inventory slots tracked through the ALTTP shop buffer

notes: This file normalizes grouping for tracker presentation only.
Every active runtime bridge check is now assigned to one tracker group.
Dungeon prizes and non-int-coded crystal reward items remain represented by dungeon-progress metadata rather than SKLMI item actions.

coverage.note: Each active bridge check is listed exactly once for tracker presentation; this is not a separate memory contract.
